title: Create - CMY
description: A modpack designed around Create and Spectrum working together to automate and store items
body:
**This modpack is in early alpha, and is still recieving changes**

Updating for Create 6 is in the works!!!

**Please understand that this is my first true foray into modding, and so this project is likely to be very buggy and (hopefully not) badly made**

# Description
CCMY is a modpack designed to meld Create and Spectrum, additinally including 
### When finished, it will include:
- Crafting recipes to integrate the two mods (in progress)
- A fully functional book for Create similar to _A Colorful World_
- Ponder functionalities for spectrum items
- Create based structures containing valuable loot (including in the deeper down)
